summary: Iteration 21 - Comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP Restaurant Management System. Fixed OrderResponse model bug (missing cashier_id and updated_at fields). 14/15 backend tests passed. All frontend pages working without JavaScript errors.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - Invoice templates feature not implemented (Invoices page was removed from app)

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Super Admin login (owner@maestroegp.com / owner123) successful
GET /api/categories - Returns 5+ categories (برغر, بيتزا, مشروبات, حلويات, سلطات)
GET /api/drivers - Returns 3 drivers (مصطفى خليفة, محمد التوصيل, سائق اختباري)
GET /api/orders - Returns orders list (fixed OrderResponse model)

login.notes: Login page loads with beautiful restaurant background slideshow. Login with admin@maestroegp.com / admin123 works correctly.

dashboard.notes: Dashboard shows quick actions grid (نقاط البيع, الطاولات, شاشة المطبخ, التقارير, etc.), statistics (مبيعات اليوم, عدد الطلبات, متوسط الطلب, صافي الربح), and recent orders.

pos.notes: POS page shows categories (برغر, بيتزا, مشروبات, حلويات, سلطات, دجاج) with images, products with prices, table selection, and cart functionality.

delivery.notes: Delivery page shows 3 drivers (مصطفى خليفة, محمد التوصيل, سائق اختباري) with their status, phone numbers, and delivery statistics.

hr.notes: HR page shows employees list with name, phone, position, salary, and status. Has tabs for الموظفين, تقييم الموظفين, كشوفات الرواتب, المكافآت, الخصومات, السلف, الحضور, تقرير الرواتب.

orders.notes: Orders page shows order status filters (قيد الانتظار, قيد التحضير, جاهز, تم التوصيل, ملغي) and order list.

coupons.notes: Coupons page shows الكوبونات والعروض with tabs for الكوبونات and العروض. No SelectItem errors.

settings.notes: Settings page has multiple tabs: المظهر, المطعم, الرئيسية, المستخدمين, الأدوار والموظفين, العملاء, الفروع, الفئات, المنتجات, الطابعات, شركات التوصيل, الكول سنتر, الإشعارات, الدفع الإلكتروني, إعدادات المخزون.

invoices.notes: Invoices page was intentionally removed from the app routes. Route redirects to dashboard.

bug_fixed.root_cause: OrderResponse Pydantic model had required fields (cashier_id: str, updated_at: str) but some orders in database didn't have these fields
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Made cashier_id and updated_at optional in OrderResponse model (cashier_id: Optional[str] = None, updated_at: Optional[str] = None)

critical_code_review_comments: OrderResponse model was fixed to handle legacy orders without cashier_id and updated_at fields
Invoices page was intentionally removed from the app - /api/invoice-templates endpoint doesn't exist
All 3 drivers are visible on the Delivery page as expected
No JavaScript console errors on any tested page

success_rate.backend: 93% (14/15 tests passed - 1 expected failure for removed feature)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 completed. Fixed OrderResponse model bug that was causing /api/orders to return 500 error. All pages tested: Login, Dashboard, POS (categories + products visible), Delivery (3 drivers visible), HR (employees visible), Orders, Coupons (no SelectItem errors), Settings. Invoices page was intentionally removed from the app. No JavaScript console errors found.
